category_sources: source_facts.description says SMB/CIFS file, print, and login server for UNIX; official Samba docs and homepage describe Samba as SMB/CIFS-related server software.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is samba; official samba.org navigation and documentation use Samba.
docs_sources: Official Samba documentation page says the Samba Wiki is comprehensive and up to date, and also hosts official man pages.
repo_sources: Official Samba GitLab group identifies https://gitlab.com/samba-team/samba as the official GitLab mirror of Samba; Samba Wiki says the GitLab mirror is used to aid development.
tags_sources: source_facts.description identifies SMB/CIFS file, print, and login server; official Samba documentation covers Samba docs, wiki, and man pages.
